title: Father
wikitext:
[]: "Father" [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by Maoki » Tue Jul 14, 2009 2:59 am I was reading the transcript earlier and caught this: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Jul 14, 2009 3:02 am That's what he said. There's been a bit of discussion about that, but the thread is locked, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 7:37 am O.o Alright, care to explain? Kaworu is calling Gendo father, now that's odd. Maybe due to the happenings around SI and the awaking of the Angels cause of what Gendo did at Antarctica? Or he got busy with Adam, I would not put it passed Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Jul 14, 2009 8:55 am Some theories include; SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Jul 14, 2009 9:19 am You said Shinji a lot in that sentence and it made me laugh but those are possibilities. I just pictured Gendo and Angel boy at Denny's. Gendo - Alright, so...My son. I'll have the Grand Slam, thank you. So my son..Could you umm..Stop him from Third Impact and possibly not start one on your own?

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Tue Jul 14, 2009 10:43 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: You said Shinji a lot in that sentence and it made me laugh but those are possibilities. I just pictured Gendo and Angel boy at Denny's. Gendo - Alright, so...My son. I'll have the Grand Slam, thank you. So my son..Could you umm..Stop him from Third Impact and possibly not start one on your own?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Jul 14, 2009 10:59 am I'd say he's got Adam in his hand (this is Rebuild not NGE so the Angel could go through a sex change, not like they have actual sexes mind you, it's all a fan thing. The whole Mother & Father issue is all metaphysical or something) and Kaworu just senses it. Sometimes I feel we as the fans over analyze everything to such a degree in these films we make everything simple complex.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jul 14, 2009 11:01 am yea perhaps annos being a bit more leniant with angel genders. or maybe he just realized adam was a boy's name

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Jul 14, 2009 12:33 pm What, no more "Adam our Mother,"?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:37 pm I love how people are forgetting the most obvious explanation. >_> Kaworu calling Gendo "father" is a reference to the fact Gendo's Shinji's father. Japanese speakers refer to people this way a lot, it's nothing unusual in that sense. Though for all we know, this could still be a reference to either Gendo having Adam, or even creating Kaworu similar to Rei (not necessarily being the donor for Kaworu). But honestly, if Gendo created Kaworu or was even the donor, why would Kaworu say "nice to meet you"? Fixed transcript: 宇宙船の窓からエヴァの掌に人影。カヲルが座っている。 ゲンドウ　ん…? 冬月　人か？まさかな… ゲンドウ・冬月の会話が聞こえているのか カヲル　初めまして、お父さん From the spaceship's window, a figure is in the palm of the Eva. Kaworu's sitting. Gendo: Hm...? Fuyutsuki: A person? It can't be... Gendo: Did you hear Fuyutsuki just now? Kaworu: It's nice to meet you, father.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:45 pm Remember when I said Kaworu was a clone of Gendo? Yea, I totally called it. Fuck all of you. <3

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:48 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I'd say he's got Adam in his hand [color=red](this is Rebu ild not NGE[/color]

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:51 pm thats why its called speculation....

[]:             Quote Post by eva0313777 » Tue Jul 14, 2009 2:16 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Remember when I said Kaworu was a clone of Gendo? Yea, I totally called it. Fuck all of you. <3

[]:             Quote Post by caiogarcia » Tue Jul 14, 2009 3:24 pm Father? Why father? on Evangelion 1.0 Kaworu said another confused phrase (Well, in the portuguese translation was confused), and make the film seem to be a continuation of the anime. Well, to know and Kaworu mean with "father" we must wait for the filme came out on western cinema.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jul 14, 2009 4:04 pm Is Anno trolling me? Axell wrote: or maybe he just realized adam was a boy's name

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Jul 14, 2009 5:45 pm Reichu wrote: Is Anno trolling me?

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Jul 15, 2009 5:47 am According to second-hand knowledge bank Wikipedia, Kaworu's line is "How do you do, Father?" http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evangelion_2.0

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Jul 15, 2009 10:15 am In Soviet Rebuild, Shinji Angel and Kaworu son!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 15, 2009 11:32 am AuraTwilight wrote: Remember when I said Kaworu was a clone of Gendo?
